title: Mobile Developer
description: Mixpanel is seeking a Mobile Developer to build analytics experiences on iOS and Android. Based in Minneapolis, you'll develop mobile SDKs and applications that help customers understand user behavior at scale. This onsite role offers the opportunity to work on products used by millions of developers worldwide.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain iOS and Android applications; build responsive, performant mobile experiences
Create and improve mobile SDKs that integrate with Mixpanel's analytics platform
Collaborate with product and backend teams to design features and APIs
Write unit tests and maintain high code quality standards across the codebase
Debug mobile performance issues and optimize app for various devices and network conditions

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

benefits: Casual dress code and flexible hours
